action.reasoning: Observation: The valid baseline (LPIPS 0.619) is dominated by fixed-orbit rendering, and the latest inspection captured the TSR.render loop plus the tail of get_spherical_cameras showing it ultimately builds rays with get_ray_directions/get_rays. Analysis: I need the full camera helper source without stdout truncation to avoid a sign/axis mistake when implementing pose-aware rendering. Decision: Save the exact helper source and related module globals to a workspace file, printing only a short confirmation; then update predict.py in the next iteration.
